assets.prompt: Use case: scientific-educational. Asset type: 16:9 website course hero. Create a polished Chinese-first ML Atlas educational illustration: a real human learner and a calm screen-based intelligent learning assistant inspect a learning map; a rising trend line, three point clusters, and directional path arrows hint at supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning. Use scientific editorial 2D/light 2.5D, crisp dark outlines, restrained shadows, high contrast, generous whitespace, and paper-like surfaces. Keep all content inside 8% margins. Use #fffef7, #fff7df, #10162f, #536dfe, #2fd27f, #36c5f0, #ffd84d, #ff9f43, #ff7ab6, #d9ceff. Render only “AI 学习全景”, exactly once. No humanoid robot, robot mascot, logo imitation, watermark, extra text, or garbled characters.

assets.prompt: Use case: scientific-educational. Asset type: 4:3 course information card. Use the approved hero as style reference only. Top scene: learner practice records flow into a simple score trend chart with one predicted point and one observed point, implying supervised prediction rather than grading. Bottom: four equal high-contrast cells. Match the hero’s crisp dark outlines, paper surfaces, restrained shadows, and ML Atlas palette; blue is the supervised accent. Render verbatim: “问题” “预测下一次练习得分”; “已有信息” “练习时长、历史得分”; “怎么学” “比较预测分数与真实得分”; “输出” “一个预测分数”. Exact Chinese, no formulas, leaderboard, logo imitation, watermark, extra text, or unsafe margins.
embeddedChinese: 比较预测分数与真实得分

assets.prompt: Use case: scientific-educational. Asset type: 4:3 ML Atlas course information card. Create a new standalone illustration continuing the exact approved AI 学习全景 hero style solely from this written specification: polished scientific-editorial 2D/light 2.5D; crisp #10162f ink outlines; #fffef7 paper and #fff7df warm canvas; restrained soft shadows and warm diffuse studio lighting; clean rounded cards; high contrast; generous whitespace; subtle tactile paper surfaces; accents #536dfe blue, #2fd27f green, #36c5f0 cyan, #ffd84d yellow, #ff9f43 orange, #ff7ab6 pink, #d9ceff lilac. Top scene: an unlabeled scatterplot of learner accuracy versus average response time, with visually separated proximity groups encoded by both color and circle/triangle/square shapes. Bottom: four equal high-contrast cells in one row with generous padding. Green is the unsupervised accent. Composition: 4:3 landscape; context scene above, four equal cells below; all text and important content inside 8% safe margins. embeddedChinese: 把相似的学习者分到一起
